# CSS color cataloging and variable suggestions (2026-03-10 11:09Z)

_**User**_

Read ALL CSS files in `d:\web development\test\src\` and catalog every unique hardcoded color value (hex, rgb, rgba, hsl, named colors) used across the project. Group them by semantic purpose (backgrounds, text, borders, accents, status colors, etc.).

Read these files:
- src/pages/Login.css
- src/pages/Agent.css
- src/pages/Dashboard.css
- src/pages/SuperAdmin.css
- src/pages/Wallboard.css
- src/pages/Reports.css
- src/components/Layout.css
- src/index.css (if exists)
- src/App.css (if exists)

For each file, list the unique colors used and their context (background, text, border, etc.).

Return a comprehensive list of:
1. All unique color values found
2. Suggested CSS variable names grouped by purpose (e.g., --bg-primary, --bg-secondary, --text-primary, --text-muted, --border-color, --accent-primary, etc.)
3. Dark theme values (current) and suggested light theme values

---

_**Agent (model composer-1.5, mode Agent)**_
